name: Baraka
overview: The show tells the story of Baraka, a man coming from South Egypt who lives in Cairo with his mother. With time, he starts borrowing lots money and gets into trouble with prominent people. His mother and his neighbor, who is also his lover, are the only ones who help him.

trailers.title: الإعلان الرسمي لمسلسل #بركة بطولة " عمرو سعد " | رمضان 2019
